cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Bansal, sir. How are you today? Jayant ji, congratulations are in order, I see.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, thank you. I'm doing well, sir. What's the update on my car loan application?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, of course, Mr. Bansal. I'm happy to inform you that your loan has been approved. We just need to finalize a few details with the dealership.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That's great news, sir. Thik hai, what's the next step?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We'll be in touch with the dealership to arrange the disbursement. I'll also send you an email with the details, haan, for your reference.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, sounds good. Thank you, sir.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 30s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A bank agent calls a customer who applied for a car loan to inform them that their loan has been approved and to coordinate the disbursement process with the car dealership.
